descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes lose opening game 5-3 to Humboldt Broncos in best-of-seven Western Canada Centennial Cup playoff.
descriptionLong: The Richmond Sockeyes, B.C. Junior Hockey League champions, lost 5-3 to the Saskatchewan champion Humboldt Broncos in overtime during game one of the best-of-seven Western Canada Centennial Cup championship series. Despite the loss, both teams are guaranteed spots in the national four-team final. Sockeyes scorers included Bryon Moller, Matt Hervey, and Jason Phillips.
